====Pokémon Generations====
[[File:Brendan PG.png|thumb|250px|Brendan in [[Pokémon Generations]]]]
Brendan appeared in ''[[PG07|The Vision]]'', where he was first seen battling several {{tc|Team Magma Grunt}}s with his {{p|Sceptile}} while infiltrating the [[Team Magma Hideout]], before running into [[Courtney]]. She then challenged him to a battle with her {{p|Camerupt}} just as [[Maxie]] and the rest of Team Magma headed for the [[Seafloor Cavern]] aboard [[Submarine Explorer 1]].

Much like the other [[player character]]s depicted in [[Pokémon Generations]], Brendan doesn't have any lines of dialogue.

Later in ''[[PG09|The Scoop]]'', a trainer was seen battling and catching Deoxys with Mega Rayquaza, although due to the trainers hidden face, it can't be 100% confirmed this was the same Brendan from ''[[PG07|The Vision]]''.
